tree.name: Bobi Klintman
tree.tradeDescription: 4-team trade: MIN traded Bobi Klintman and Wendell Moore Jr. to DET; DET traded Cam Spencer to MEM; MEM traded Ulrich Chomche to TOR and a 2030 2nd round pick to MIN; TOR traded to MIN

assetsGivenUp.name: Cam Spencer
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 53rd overall by Detroit in the 2024 NBA Draft with a pick acquired from Philadelphia (originally NYK's pick)
